blocks.title: Volunteer
blocks.body: Invite people to help with events, translation, setup, outreach, and projects.

image.caption: Youth volunteer team
image.description: Illustration of young volunteers making community posters.

blocks.title: Ways to help
blocks.body:
- Welcome guests at events
- Help set up and clean up
- Take photos for the gallery
- Write short news updates
- Translate community announcements
